parameters-en.Interval 1: Sets the pitch of the first pitch-shifted voice in semitones, from 2 octaves down to 2 octaves up.
parameters-en.Cents 1: Sets the pitch of the first pitch-shifted voice in cents, from -50.0 to +50.0.
parameters-en.Delay 1: Delays the first pitch-shifted voice slightly. At lower values, it can thicken up your tone or at higher values, it can kind of emulate strumming from a single note.
parameters-en.V1 Level: Controls the level of the first pitch-shifted voice.
parameters-en.Interval 2: Sets the pitch of the second pitch-shifted voice in semitones, from 2 octaves down to 2 octaves up.
parameters-en.Cents 2: Sets the pitch of the second pitch-shifted voice in cents, from -50.0 to +50.0.
parameters-en.Delay 2: Delays the second pitch-shifted voice slightly. At lower values, it can thicken up your tone or at higher values, it can kind of emulate strumming from a single note.
parameters-en.V2 Level: Controls the level of the second pitch-shifted voice.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the pitch-shifted signal and the dry signal. At 0%, no pitch-shifted signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
